glosses.hi: अंगूर की बेल; अंगूर का बाग
glosses.ja: ブドウの木; ブドウ畑

sentences.target: Je vois la vigne derrière la maison.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vwa la viɲ dɛʁjɛʁ la mɛzɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je vois la vigne derrière la maison.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vwa la viɲ dɛʁjɛʁ la mɛzɔ̃/
translations.en: I see the grapevine behind the house.
translations.es: Veo la parra detrás de la casa.
translations.de: Ich sehe die Weinrebe hinter dem Haus.
translations.it: Vedo la vite dietro la casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看到房子后面的葡萄藤。
translations.yue: 我見到屋後面嘅葡萄藤。
translations.ru: Я вижу виноградную лозу за домом.
translations.pt: Vejo a videira atrás da casa.
translations.he: אני רואה את הגפן מאחורי הבית.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy cây nho phía sau ngôi nhà.
translations.nl: Ik zie de wijnstok achter het huis.
translations.uk: Я бачу виноградну лозу за будинком.
translations.hu: Látom a szőlőtőkét a ház mögött.
translations.hi: मैं घर के पीछे अंगूर की बेल देखता हूँ.
translations.el: Βλέπω την κληματαριά πίσω από το σπίτι.
translations.id: Saya melihat tanaman anggur di belakang rumah.
translations.ro: Văd vița de vie în spatele casei.
translations.ja: 家の後ろにブドウの木が見えます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner marking the noun as specific.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement meaning ‘behind’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘maison’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘derrière’.

sentences.target: On travaille à la vigne ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁavaj a la viɲ sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: On travaille à la vigne ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁavaj a la viɲ sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re working at the vineyard this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana trabajamos en el viñedo.
translations.de: Wir arbeiten heute Morgen im Weinberg.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上我们在葡萄园工作。
translations.yue: 今朝我哋喺葡萄園度做嘢。
translations.ru: Сегодня утром мы работаем на винограднике.
translations.pt: Esta manhã estamos a trabalhar na vinha.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi làm việc ở vườn nho.
translations.nl: Vanmorgen werken we in de wijngaard.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці ми працюємо на винограднику.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम अंगूर के बाग में काम कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί δουλεύουμε στον αμπελώνα.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig jobber vi i vinmarken.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami bekerja di kebun anggur.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen arbetar vi i vingården.
translations.ro: În această dimineață lucrăm la vie.
translations.da: Her til morgen arbejder vi i vinmarken.
translations.ja: 今朝はぶどう畑で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement; colloquially ‘we’.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive here, describing an action.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘vigne’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘à’ indicating place/context of work.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘matin’.
Common noun, masculine; temporal complement (time adverbial).

sentences.target: Tu arroses la vigne quand il fait chaud.
sentences.reading: /ty aʁoz la viɲ kɑ̃dil fɛ ʃo/

translations.fr: Tu arroses la vigne quand il fait chaud.
translations.ipa: /ty aʁoz la viɲ kɑ̃dil fɛ ʃo/
translations.en: You water the grapevine when it’s hot.
translations.es: Riegas la parra cuando hace calor.
translations.de: Du gießt die Weinrebe, wenn es heiß ist.
translations.it: Annaffi la vite quando fa caldo.
translations.zh-Hans: 天热的时候你给葡萄藤浇水。
translations.yue: 天氣熱嘅時候你會淋水俾葡萄藤。
translations.ru: Ты поливаешь виноградную лозу, когда жарко.
translations.pt: Regas a videira quando faz calor.
translations.vi: Khi trời nóng, bạn tưới cây nho.
translations.ar: عندما يكون الجو حارًا، تسقي كرمة العنب.
translations.nl: Als het warm is, geef je de wijnstok water.
translations.uk: Коли спекотно, ти поливаєш виноградну лозу.
translations.hu: Amikor meleg van, meglocsolod a szőlőtőkét.
translations.hi: जब गर्मी होती है, तुम अंगूर की बेल को पानी देते हो.
translations.el: Όταν κάνει ζέστη, ποτίζεις την κληματαριά.
translations.nb: Når det er varmt, vanner du vinranken.
translations.id: Saat cuaca panas, kamu menyiram tanaman anggur.
translations.sv: När det är varmt vattnar du vinrankan.
translations.ro: Când este cald, uzi vița de vie.
translations.cs: Když je horko, zaléváš vinnou révu.
translations.da: Når det er varmt, vander du vinranken.
translations.ja: 暑いときはぶどうの木に水をやる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking ‘la vigne’ as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘vigne’.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the verb.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause.
Subject personal pronoun; impersonal ‘il’ acting as dummy subject in a weather expression.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; used idiomatically in ‘il fait chaud’ to express weather.
Adjective used predicatively as complement of ‘faire’ to express temperature.

sentences.target: Nous marchons le long de la vigne.
sentences.reading: /nu maʁʃɔ̃ lə lɔ̃ də la viɲ/

translations.fr: Nous marchons le long de la vigne.
translations.ipa: /nu maʁʃɔ̃ lə lɔ̃ də la viɲ/
translations.pt: Estamos a caminhar ao longo da vinha.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đi dọc theo vườn nho.
translations.hi: हम अंगूर के बाग के साथ-साथ चल रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang berjalan di sepanjang kebun anggur.
translations.ja: ぶどう畑に沿って歩いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; intransitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; part of the fixed expression ‘le long de’.
Noun within the locution ‘le long de’ forming a prepositional phrase meaning ‘along’.
Preposition completing the locution ‘le long de’ and introducing its complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘vigne’.
Common noun, feminine; complement of the preposition ‘de’ within the locution ‘le long de’.
